sections.sectionMetadataReason: Hero has its own full-width video background and gradient - this is block-specific design, not section styling

sequences.description: Full-width video background with overlaid heading 'MEMORIAL DAY SALE', subheading 'Shop Our Best Savings of the Year', featured product link, and a CTA button
sequences.reason: Video background with gradient overlay, positioned text, and CTA buttons requires hero block structure. Cannot be authored as default content - needs video element, overlay positioning, and gradient effects.

contentDetails.heading: Shop Our Best Savings of the Year

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Light background, single block section but call-to-action is a structured promotional component with its own layout

sequences.description: Promotional banner with eyebrow, heading, body text, and CTA button for financing offer
sequences.reason: Structured promotional layout with specific eyebrow/heading/body/CTA pattern. While the content could theoretically be typed, the call-to-action block provides the specific visual treatment (structured layout, styling) that differentiates this from plain content.

contentDetails.heading: 0% Interest for 60 Months*
contentDetails.body: On furniture purchases of $9,999 or more...

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Light background, carousel block has its own interactive sliding behavior

sequences.description: Horizontal card carousel with 5 category slides, each with vertical image and linked heading
sequences.reason: Interactive sliding carousel with navigation arrows and pagination dots. Requires JavaScript decoration for Swiper/sliding behavior. Repeating structured pattern of image+link items that cycle through.

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Background image is section-level styling that wraps the call-to-action block. The blurred floral image provides container context.

sequences.description: Call-to-action with background image of blurred flowers, eyebrow text, heading, and frosted glass CTA button
sequences.reason: Same call-to-action block pattern as Section 2 but with background image styling at section level. Structured promotional component with eyebrow/heading/CTA pattern.

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Blue fabric texture background is section-level styling. The commerce-teaser block sits within this styled container.

sequences.description: Commerce teaser with product image, eyebrow, heading, description, and three CTA buttons on blue fabric background
sequences.reason: Complex split layout teaser with image container, structured text content (eyebrow, heading, description), and multiple CTA buttons. Cannot be default content due to the structured image+content layout and multiple action buttons.

contentDetails.heading: Always Free. Always Inspired.
contentDetails.description: From floorplans to finishing touches, we have solutions for every space, any size.

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Lifestyle background image is section-level styling for the commerce-teaser block.

sequences.description: Commerce teaser with video element, eyebrow, heading, description, and CTA button on lifestyle background
sequences.reason: Same commerce-teaser pattern as Section 5 but with video instead of static image, and featured-left layout. Complex structured component with media + text + CTAs.

contentDetails.heading: Happiness in Every Moment
contentDetails.description: For over 140 years, we've been committed to craftsmanship, honesty in every interaction, and always finding a way to say 'yes.'...

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Light background, call-to-action block provides its own visual treatment

sequences.description: Newsletter signup CTA with heading, subheading, and signup button
sequences.reason: Structured call-to-action component with heading, subtitle, and button. The block provides specific visual treatment (centered layout, spacing) for the newsletter signup pattern.

contentDetails.heading: GET EXCLUSIVE ACCESS
contentDetails.subheading: Be the first to know about offers, inspiration, and new products.

sections.sectionMetadataReason: Light background with small legal text - fragment provides reusability across pages

sequences.description: Fragment containing legal disclaimer text paragraphs about sale terms and financing details
sequences.reason: Legal disclaimers are loaded as a fragment for reuse across multiple pages. This is standard EDS pattern for shared content like terms and conditions.

hero-video-sale.structure: Video/image background with gradient overlay, positioned text content (eyebrow, heading, CTA), optional feature product link

call-to-action-promo.structure: Container with text area (eyebrow h4, heading h2, optional paragraph) + CTA button area. Supports background images at section level.

carousel-category.structure: Swiper-based carousel with slides. Each slide has image + text. Supports vertical-image card-slide variant. Navigation arrows + pagination dots.

commerce-teaser-split.structure: Split layout with image/video container + content container (eyebrow, heading, description, multiple CTAs). Supports featured-left and featured-right layouts.

fragment.structure: Reference to reusable content fragment loaded from a separate document path

summary.notes: This homepage is entirely block-driven with no plain default content sequences. All sections use custom Havertys blocks (hero-video-sale, call-to-action-promo, commerce-teaser-split, carousel-category) plus a standard fragment block for legal text. The page heavily relies on background images/videos for visual impact.
